name: Baked Ham
recipeInstructions:
Note: This recipe assumes using an uncooked ham. Omit boiling the ham altogether if using a pre-cooked ham.
Wash the ham and cover with boiling water. Let it cook on top of the stove for 4 hours. Let the ham stand in liquid overnight.
Next day, remove the fatty rind and make gashes across the surface of the ham. Stick whole cloves into the ham.
Make a paste by mixing the sugar, flour, mustard, syrup, and water (use water in which the ham was cooked if available).
Spread the paste evenly over the ham and place it in a roasting pan. Bake uncovered at 400°F for 45 minutes.
